---
title: "Rāg Pūrvī"
subtitle: "*e dhana dhana*"
description: "Composition by Sultān husain sirkī, in Tintāl (Madhyalay). Note: The Bishnupuri interpretation is characterized by the use of śuddha dhaivat, in contrast to the more commonly employed komal dhaivat."
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Sultān husain sirkī &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Tintāl (Madhyalay)
:::

> *Note: The Bishnupuri interpretation is characterized by the use of śuddha dhaivat, in contrast to the more commonly employed komal dhaivat.*

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> e dhana dhana caraṇ parasata haī ānanda  
> sukha bhayo mero tana mana caraṇ parasat

**Antarā**

> sultān jarā jarī jarā bakś nizāmuddīn auliyā

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Tintāl is a 16-beat cycle divided as **4 + 4 + 4 + 4** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **2**, **O**, **3**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the sixteen columns correspond to beats 1–16, with sam **X** at beat 1, **2** at beat 5, **O** (khālī) at beat 9, and **3** at beat 13. 

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   |   |   | **O** |   |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $G$ | $M$ | $P$ | $P$ | $P$ |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **e** | **-** | **dha** | **na** | **-** |
| $\lb{DM}$ | $-$ | $P$ | $M$ | $P$ | $\lb{\sps{G}m}$ | $G$ | $-$ | $m$ | $G$ | $\lb{rS}$ | $S$ | $\mn{N}$ | $S$ | $r$ | $-$ |
| **dha** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **na** | **-** | **-** | **ca** | **ra** | **ṇ** | **-** | **-** | **pa** | **ra** | **-** |
| $G$ | $m$ | $g$ | $-$ | $r$ | $-$ | $g$ | $M$ | $P$ | $M$ | $P$ | $D$ | $M$ | $P$ | $\lb{\sps{G}m}$ | $-$ |
| **sa** | **-** | **ta** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **haī** | **-** | **ā** | **-** | **-** | **na** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| $G$ | $r$ | $-$ | $\lb{GM}$ | $P$ | $G$ | $r$ | $G$ | $r$ | $S$ | $-$ | $S$ | $\mn{N}$ | $r$ | $G$ | $M$ |
| **nda** | **-** | **-** | **su** | **-** | **kha** | **-** | **bha** | **-** | **yo** | **-** | **me** | **ro** | **-** | **ta** | **na** |
| $P$ | $\lb{DM}$ | $-$ | $P$ | $\lb{MP}$ | $\lb{\sps{G}m}$ | $G$ | $-$ | $m$ | $G$ | $\lb{rS}$ | $S$ | $\mn{N}$ | $S$ | $r$ | $-$ |
| **ma** | **na** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ca** | **ra** | **ṇ** | **-** | **-** | **pa** | **ra** | **-** |
| $G$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $m$ | $-$ | $G$ | $-$ | $r$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ |
| **sa** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **t** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   |   |   | **O** |   |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $G$ | $G$ | $P$ | $M$ | $D$ |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **su** | **l** | **tā** | **-** | **-** |
| $\tr{S}$ | $-$ | $-$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $-$ | $N$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{r}$ | $N$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $-$ |
| **n** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ja** | **rā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ja** | **rī** | **-** | **-** | **ja** | **rā** | **-** |
| $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $N$ | $-$ | $\tr{r}$ | $\tr{G}$ | $\tr{r}$ | $-$ | $\tr{S}$ | $-$ | $-$ | $N$ | $\tr{S}$ | $N$ | $D$ | $N$ |
| **ba** | **k** | **ś** | **-** | **-** | **ni** | **zā** | **-** | **mu** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ddī** | **-** | **n** |
| $\tr{S}$ | $N$ | $\lb{DP}$ | $P$ | $M$ | $P$ | $M$ | $P$ | $\lb{\sps{G}m}$ | $-$ | $G$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ | $-$ |
| **au** | **li** | **yā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::
